_doc: Voiceover for section 01 (prompt typing). User types 'show yourself flying' and sends. Daedalus replies. No music — added at final stitch.

sfx._note: keyboard typing burst — typing starts at ~0.65s, runs ~770ms
sfx.prompt: short burst of mechanical keyboard typing, realistic, dry studio recording, no music

sfx._note: send click — cursor reaches Send + clicks ~3.2s
sfx.prompt: single mouse button click, brief snappy click, isolated, dry recording
